system.flavor: The basic move of workshop martial arts, flashy and effective.
system.effect:
Area Effect [X]: Push all adjacent foes 1 or (5+) two spaces, then deal 2 damage to one of those foes. If you are adjacent to 3 or more foes, increase damage and push by +2.
Conserve foe must save or be stunned. Foe is dazed on a successful save.
